title: Banner Flags
description: Place banners horizontally as flags on fences, walls and other pole-like blocks!
body:
### ❗I RECOMMEND USING THE DATAPACK VERSION FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE
# 
**My other decorative datapacks:**
> 🛏️ Banner Bedsheets: https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-bedsheets
> 
> 💤 Gardener's Dream: https://modrinth.com/datapack/gardeners-dream

# Banner Flags 🏳️
> Ever since banners were added I've wanted to place them horizontally like flags. Now I have made it possible using this data pack!


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hXGMIIB3e5Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## 🚩FEATURES:
- Place flag in 8 directions!
- Uses the exact banner design you placed
- Break the block it is placed on to remove it and get your banner back
- Place multiple on the same block!
- Works in multiplayer & survival friendly!
- Can make flags bigger, rotate, flip them and even make them wave in the wind!
- Detailed feature explanations in advancements page.

## ⛳SUPPORTED BLOCKS:
- fences
- walls
- glass panes
- iron & copper bars
- iron & copper chains
- lightning rods
- bamboo stem
- end rod

## 🤔HOW TO USE:
Crouch + click a banner on one of the supported blocks to place your banner as a flag! Break the block it is placed on to remove it.

Crouch near the flag pole while holding a diamond to make your flag bigger! You get your diamond back when breaking the flag.

Crouch near the flag pole while holding a stick to flip the flag! Hold the stick in your offhand to rotate the flag.

Crouch near the flag pole while holding a feather to make the flag wave!

## ❗FOR ADMINS
If you have land protection on your server use this command:

'/function bannerflags:delay_on' 

This will add a small delay when placing banners so players can't place them in protected areas.

Performance is optimized & tested, it wont cause you any issues.

## ❌UNINSTALLATION:
If you don't end up liking the pack here are the ways you can remove the flags:
- manually breaking each block that a flag has been placed on so you get the banners back.
or
- writing /function bannerflags:removeall (you wont get your banners back though)

## ❕SUMMARY:
This datapack greatly expands the ways you can use banners in Minecraft, such as for decoration, storytelling & direction pointers.
If you have any questions, issues or suggestions you can DM me on Discord @Gurkis
